needle_original_qp_recall_at_1.description: Needle Qp recall@1 on original paired corpus.

needle_shuffle_texts_qp_recall_at_1.description: Needle Qp recall@1 when texts are shuffled and coordinates held.

needle_shuffle_coords_qp_recall_at_1.description: Needle Qp recall@1 when coordinates are shuffled and texts held.

multihop_original_qp_chain_recall.description: Multi-hop Qp chain recall on original paired corpus.

multihop_shuffle_texts_qp_chain_recall.description: Multi-hop Qp chain recall when texts are shuffled and coordinates held.

multihop_shuffle_coords_qp_chain_recall.description: Multi-hop Qp chain recall when coordinates are shuffled and texts held.

b3_metadata_filter_needle_recall_at_1.description: B3 metadata-filter needle recall@1 (same QpCoordinate compatibility filter as DSS).

b3_real_embedding_needle_recall_at_1.description: B3 real embedding baseline (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2) needle recall@1.

b3_real_embedding_needle_recall_at_k.description: B3 real embedding baseline (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2) needle recall@5.

b3_real_embedding_multihop_recall_at_1.description: B3 real embedding baseline (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2) multi-hop recall@1.

b3_real_embedding_multihop_recall_at_k.description: B3 real embedding baseline (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2) multi-hop recall@5.

embedding_queries.description: Counterfactual run marker (no LLM tokens consumed).

traceability.absence_reason: Traceability metrics are out of scope for counterfactual shuffle tests.

governance.absence_reason: Governance metrics are out of scope for counterfactual shuffle tests.

run_config.partial_status_note: 'partial' indicates traceability/governance groups are intentionally out-of-scope, not retrieval failure.
run_config.d2_note: Hold merge of counterfactual shuffle distributions until hugooconnor's stated PR window expires (14 days) or their PR lands.
